case_title: ALEJANDRO DIAZ ARCEO VS. TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAZ ARCEO, ALEJANDRO AS TO DEFENDANT 1188  MISSION STREET LP

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAZ ARCEO, ALEJANDRO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES 1188  MISSION STREET LP $150.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $190.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, 1188 MISSION ST., LP, IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY DIAZ ARCEO, ALEJANDRO AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-15-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 1188  MISSION STREET LP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-01-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFENDANT 1188 MISSION ST. LP. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JACKY LOPEZ. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2012 - JUDGMENT.
